properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We're in a mighty conflict here The army of the lord We must join forces standing tall And lean upon his word

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The enemy is now and new And bravely circles round And comes a cry from the battlefield Another soldier down

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Go then within Stand by his side Lend him your strength once more Oh bear him up with faith and prayer Until the battles o'er

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And fight before the victory The cross before the crown Be ever watchful hear the cry Another soldier down

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We set our minds on victory Advancing day by day With God our hope Our strategy Our fortress on the way

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Then at the end There is rest An everlasting prayer Oh and the fear no more will hear Another soldier down
